description: Directed acyclic graph of scheme prerequisites. An edge A→B means scheme A must be obtained/applied for before scheme B. Used by the prerequisite sequencer to produce the correct application order.
note: The sequencer performs a topological sort of this graph to produce a linear application sequence for a given user's eligible schemes.

edges.reason: PM Kisan payment is made directly to bank account. Without PMJDY/bank account, DBT transfer fails.
LPG subsidy transferred to bank account. Bank account required.
Construction assistance directly transferred to beneficiary bank account.
Pension amount transferred to bank account via DBT.
Maternity benefit transferred to woman's bank account.
Monthly contribution auto-debited from bank account.
APY requires savings bank account for contribution auto-debit.
Annual premium ₹436 auto-debited from bank account.
Annual premium ₹20 auto-debited from bank account.
KCC is a bank product — requires existing bank relationship.
Crop insurance claim paid to bank account.
Loanee farmers with KCC are automatically enrolled in PMFBY. KCC is the fastest path to PMFBY for loanee farmers.
edges.note: Non-loanee farmers can voluntarily enroll in PMFBY without KCC.

edges.reason: Under Ayushman Bharat expansion, NFSA beneficiaries (PHH/AAY ration card) are included. Getting a ration card first enables Ayushman Bharat access for non-SECC households.
edges.note: Only relevant if user is not already SECC-listed. SECC-listed users can access Ayushman Bharat directly.

edges.reason: Under PMAY-G convergence, MGNREGA provides 90 days of unskilled labour for house construction. Having a Job Card enables this convergence benefit.
edges.note: PMAY-G is not blocked by absence of MGNREGA card, but benefit is enhanced with it.

application_sequence_rules.rule: Always apply for PM_JAN_DHAN first if user has no bank account.
application_sequence_rules.reason: 13 of 15 schemes require bank account for DBT. Without it, everything else fails.

application_sequence_rules.rule: Apply for Aadhaar before any scheme.
application_sequence_rules.reason: Aadhaar is required for Aadhaar-seeding of bank accounts which enables DBT for all schemes. Aadhaar enrollment is not a scheme but is the foundational prerequisite.

application_sequence_rules.rule: Apply for ration card (PHH/AAY) early if user doesn't have one.
application_sequence_rules.reason: Ration card unlocks PMGKAY foodgrain, Ayushman Bharat, PM Ujjwala. State process, may take weeks.

application_sequence_rules.rule: KCC before PMFBY for loanee farmers.
application_sequence_rules.reason: Crop loan via KCC auto-enrolls in PMFBY at subsidised premium.
